instagram_caption.context: Weekend sourdough announcement for this week.
must_include: Flavors: classic; olive + rosemary; hint of mustard
Pre-orders via Instagram DM or WhatsApp until Friday 18:00
Warm, casual Basque; mention 'zu' or 'zure'; tiny Spanish like 'gracias' or 'vale' ok

whatsapp_reply.customer_question: A customer asks: Are you open on Sunday, and do you have lactose-free options?
must_include: Confirm most breads (including weekend sourdough) are lactose-free
Clarify pastries like cinnamon rolls contain butter; vegan mini cookies on Fridays are lactose-free
Offer to reserve a loaf under their name
Mention address in Gros and option to WhatsApp for preorder

banner.context: Short autumn banner about the pumpkin spiced loaf returning.
must_include: Announce the pumpkin spiced loaf is back
Keep it concise (ideally under 25 words), warm tone
